structured_output.reasoning: Confirmed real vulnerability: HiveEngineSpec.where_latest_partition() and PrestoEngineSpec.where_latest_partition() pass partition column names from database.get_indexes() directly into sqlalchemy.Column() without explicit identifier quoting. A user with sql_lab role who can create datasets pointing at a Hive/Presto table with crafted partition metadata column names could inject SQL into the generated WHERE clause. Fixed by wrapping col_name with sqlalchemy.sql.quoted_name(col_name, quote=True) to force dialect-specific identifier quoting, matching existing codebase patterns (e.g. base.py:2221).
